name: mb_fdivint
m5_band: CPI 1.20-1.47 — VEN_FP_OVERLAP (GAP1): an FDIV (occ 39) shadow overlaps 32 independent integer adds (paired U/V); the integer pipe is freed after the +2 dispatch slot while the FP unit stays busy 39c, so the adds retire IN the shadow and only the trailing fld1 FP producer pays the FP-unit-busy wait. CPI well below the serialized-occupancy default (~1.73).
note: GAP1 demo (gaps doc _GAPS_vs_ventium.md). GATED on VEN_FP_OVERLAP: golden generated with the split-timeline oracle (p5trace fpovl=1) AND the RTL built with +define+VEN_FP_OVERLAP (separate obj_dir_fpovl). The 32 adds retire (paired) in the fdiv shadow; the trailing fld1 pays the FP-unit-busy wait. Validated RTL-vs-oracle per-instruction in steady state (compare.py --mode cycle: only cold-start/exit transients differ, all within the 10% band). DEFAULT (no define) is byte/cycle-identical -> the existing FP bands are untouched. APPROXIMATIONS: masked-#DE exception ORDERING not modeled (independent integers retire in the shadow; sound under masked #DE since QEMU already retired this exact stream); the FDIV quotient is committed to fpr at issue+2 (early), gated for FP dependents by the unchanged fp_ready latency.
